gaps.description: PRD §1: list() path format consistency across backends — implemented with / prefix

PRD §1: scan() streaming — OPFSBackend uses true streaming via chunked reads; NodeFsBackend uses readline streams; AgenticStoreBackend loads full file content into memory before splitting lines (inherent KV store limitation)
PRD §1: OPFS walkDir error handling — gracefully skips bad entries with console.error + continue
PRD §2: File metadata size/mtime/stat() with permissions field {read, write} on all backends (NodeFsBackend reads real OS permissions; others return {read:true, write:true})
PRD §2: Symlink support in NodeFsBackend with cycle detection
PRD §2: batchGet/batchSet on all three backends
PRD §3: Typed error classes NotFoundError/PermissionDeniedError/IOError in src/errors.ts
PRD §3: All backends throw typed errors (IOError, NotFoundError); consistent re-throw pattern prevents double-wrapping; scanStream silently skips unreadable files intentionally
PRD §3: readOnly mode write interception in filesystem.ts
PRD §4: Complete per-backend test suites — 55+ test files in test/ and test/backends/
PRD §4: Cross-backend consistency tests — 5 test files (cross-backend, consistency, extra, scanstream, error-consistency)
PRD §4: Edge case tests — edge-cases.test.js/ts, edge-cases-error-types, streaming-scan-edge-cases, opfs-walkdir-error
PRD §5: README with usage examples — present with Quick Start, Auto-Selection, AI Agent, Semantic Search examples
PRD §5: Per-backend configuration docs and performance comparison table — present in README.md
PRD §5: JSDoc on backend classes — 5/6 backends have full JSDoc (agentic-store, opfs, memory, local-storage, sqlite); NodeFsBackend has zero JSDoc
